questions.question: Design a half subtractor circuit for the given inputs A and B. What is the output of the half subtractor for the following set of inputs: A=1, B=0?
questions.hint: Use standard digital logic gates and explain your design

questions.question: Design a full subtractor circuit for the given inputs A, B, and C. What is the output of the full subtractor for the following set of inputs: A=1, B=1, C=0?
questions.hint: Use standard digital logic gates and explain your design

questions.question: Which of the following equations correctly represents the half subtractor equation: A2B2 = A1B1 + (A1B2 AND NOT B1) OR (NOT A1B2 AND B1)
questions.hint: Use Boolean algebra to simplify the equation
